description: Create a Constraint — a limit the design must respect, vs a Requirement which is a goal to achieve. For a numeric budget (BL-11) set `quantity` (unit-bearing name like mass_kg / latency_ms / cost_usd), `limit`, and `direction` (maximum = stay at or under, the default). Then attach the spenders with `constrains` and read the rollup with `budget_report`.

direction.description: `maximum` (default: total must stay at or under) / `minimum`.

limit.description: The budget number, in the quantity's unit.

quantity.description: For a numeric budget: unit-bearing name, e.g. `mass_kg`, `latency_ms`.

name: add_constraint
